outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Ceasefire collapses: Iran re-closes Hormuz as Trump says he's 'ready to go' back to war
outlets.summary: NPR reports the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire has effectively collapsed after Iran formally re-closed the Strait of Hormuz. Trump told CNBC he is 'ready to go' back to full war. EU adopted new sanctions at Luxembourg FAC.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: US destroyer disables Iranian tanker in Gulf of Oman; Tehran vows retaliation
outlets.summary: CNN reports USS Spruance disabled Iranian cargo tanker Touska with 5-inch gunfire after it refused boarding. Tehran condemned 'armed piracy.' Drone swarm retaliation followed the next day.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump on Iran: 'I'm ready to go' as ceasefire collapses and Hormuz shuts again
outlets.summary: Fox News covers Trump's CNBC interview declaring he is 'ready to go' back to war. Coverage emphasizes USS Spruance's 'decisive action' against Touska and blockade enforcement.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Iran Slams Hormuz Shut Again — Ceasefire Dead
outlets.summary: Daily Caller reports Iran's formal re-closure of the strait. Emphasizes Trump's 'America First' resolve and EU's new sanctions package as evidence of international pressure on Tehran.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran re-closes Hormuz as ceasefire expires; IDF strikes Hezbollah launcher in Qalawiyah
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera reports Iran's formal Hormuz closure announcement by Speaker Ghalibaf, IDF's Qalawiyah launcher strike, EU new sanctions, and Pope Leo's 'delusion of omnipotence' warning.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: EU adopts new Iran sanctions as Hormuz shuts; Pope warns of 'delusion of omnipotence'
outlets.summary: Reuters covers the EU Luxembourg FAC sanctions package targeting IRGC Navy commanders and Iran Ministry of Petroleum officials. Pope Leo's April 21 statement criticizes great-power hubris.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF destroys Hezbollah launcher in Qalawiyah after radar detection; Netanyahu vows ground push
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers the Qalawiyah strike and Netanyahu's statement that a ground component is required for regime change in Iran. 5 IDF divisions remain in Lebanon.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: As ceasefire dies, Netanyahu pushes wider war while Trump signals 'ready to go'
outlets.summary: Haaretz analysis on the collapse of diplomatic track. Netanyahu pushing for expanded ground operations while Trump sets stage for renewed strikes. Domestic political risk rising.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: US armed piracy against Touska tanker violates international law — Araghchi
outlets.summary: Press TV frames the USS Spruance action as unlawful piracy. Quotes FM Araghchi condemning 'the armed piracy committed by the American destroyer.' Calls for international response.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Ghalibaf declares Strait of Hormuz closed to hostile vessels as ceasefire expires
outlets.summary: Iran International reports Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf's formal Hormuz closure declaration. Covers EU sanctions rejection by Iran MFA and Pezeshkian's 'war benefits no one' statement.
